reconstruction_confidence_reason: xAI has published less documentation than OpenAI or Anthropic. Grok's persona and principles are partially described in xAI's blog posts and marketing materials. Behavioral analysis fills significant gaps.

sources.title: Community behavioral analysis — AI System Prompts Library contributors

notes: Grok is explicitly positioned as a less restricted alternative to GPT-4o and Claude, with a distinctive personality emphasizing wit, directness, and anti-paternalism. Its real-time integration with X (formerly Twitter) creates unique capabilities and risks around misinformation. The Fun Mode feature is a documented, user-accessible behavioral mode that increases edginess and explicit humor.
